creator: kristinacors
caption:
If New York hasn’t felt magical to you yet…it’s not you… you just haven’t been going to the right places.

Most people come here, waste hours deciding where to go, end up in average spots, and leave feeling like NYC is overrated.

Meanwhile…there’s a version of this city that feels electric, cinematic, and full of magic, you just need to know where to find it.

That’s exactly why I created my 7 day NYC itinerary.

Every single day is mapped out for you:
• The most aesthetic cafés, rooftops, and hidden gems
• Organized by neighborhood so everything flows effortlessly
• Exact travel times, opening hours, and logistics handled

No overthinking. No wasted time. No “where should we go next?”

Just showing up… and actually feeling the city.

Right now …it’s $29 and it will completely change your experience here.

Comment “New York City” and I’ll send it to you! #travelbucketlist #nycitinerary #thingstodoinnyc #nycluxury #nychiddengems

transcription.text: three places in New York City that will make you feel alive again. The first spot is one of the coolest wine bars I've ever been to in New York City. You can just grab a book and a glass of wine and meet other book lovers. I feel like this is the type of spot where you meet someone that changes your life unexpectedly. It's called Bibliotheque. The second spot is perfect for date night. I love how uniquely stunning their decor is. It's called Mono Mono. The third spot is one of my favorite finds because it transports you to the 1920s and there's really no other place like it. But before I share it, here's the thing you need to understand about New York. New York will only give you that feeling if you know where to go. Without a plan, you lose hours figuring things out, end up in average spots, and miss the places that actually make the city feel special. That's exactly why I created a seven-day New York City itinerary. And it's not just a list of spots. Every day is fully planned for you. From the most picturesque spots and rooftops to hidden gems, organized by neighborhood so your entire day flows effortlessly. Literally every detail is handled. Travel time between stops for walking and driving, and exact opening and closing hours. So there's zero planning, zero friction, and zero decision fatigue. Comment New York City to shop my New York City itinerary. And by the way, the name of this third spot is The Backroom. Follow for more.
